entries.quote: This is like a travel agent in my pocket," describing a future where generative AI acts as an always-on travel assistant across flights, hotels, transportation, and dining.
entries.signal: Booking aggressively positioning AI-powered personalized travel assistance as core competitive moat; direct threat to any OTA/fintech relying on traditional booking friction or opaque pricing to capture wallet share.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Fogel/Booking believe AI agents will disintermediate legacy OTA workflows and price-sensitivity; they're betting the platform that owns the agent relationship owns the customer.

entries.quote: Fogel discussed positioning Booking to compete in the AI era and momentum in global travel amid investor concerns about AI disruption
entries.signal: Leadership is defending against AI-native competitors; indicates Booking sees existential pressure from generative AI in travel discovery and booking flows
entries.belief: [Inferred · Medium] Fogel emphasizes Booking's existing scale and data moat, but public messaging suggests awareness that margins are under AI-driven disruption threat

entries.quote: The future of travel is the 'connected trip.' Everything is seamless, everything is easy, and everything updates automatically if conditions change. AI holds the key to fully realizing this vision.
entries.signal: Booking prioritizing integrated, real-time travel experiences powered by AI as competitive moat—direct threat to fragmented card-travel offerings
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Fogel sees AI-driven experience bundling as the next frontier; massive R&D bet on "connected trip" ecosystem suggests Booking is consolidating travel services end-to-end
